handoff_sequence.responsibility: Own route framing, source-of-truth checks, and the escalation boundary before the long-horizon pass starts.
Carry the bounded execution segment without widening the named route or hiding transitions.
Close verification, transition readiness, and return-anchor posture after the bounded run.
Run long-horizon-depth and tool-trajectory-discipline evals on the named route artifacts.
Prepare state_capsule, decision, and episode writeback while keeping distillation claims candidate-only.
